creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Pawel Stefaniak from comment #2)

Hi Pawel,

No contradiction, it can be both. We can start by adding it to ports
making it available for 12 & 13 users, then late it will be part of
the base system for future releases.

Formally, I don't need author approval to proceed, but it will
be nice if we can work in synergy.

regards
-- rodrigo
